pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 9: SPEC_FILE="/home/ga/Desktop/deployment_spec.txt"; line 150: cat > "${SPEC_FILE}". Confirmed the file is created at this path during task setup.

setup_task.sh line 11: EXPORT_FILE="/home/ga/Documents/browser_config_export.html"; deployment_spec.txt Section 5: 'Export favorites to: /home/ga/Documents/browser_config_export.html'; export_result.sh line 122: checks this exact path.

setup_task.sh line 10: DEPLOYMENT_LOG="/home/ga/Desktop/deployment_log.txt"; deployment_spec.txt Section 5: 'Deployment log: /home/ga/Desktop/deployment_log.txt'; export_result.sh line 153: checks this exact path.
deployment_spec.txt Section 1 (embedded in setup_task.sh line 168): 'Folder: "Market Data"'. Cross-referenced with export_result.sh which checks for 'market data' in exported HTML.

deployment_spec.txt Section 1 line 169: 'Markets         https://finance.yahoo.com'. URL verified via WebFetch - finance.yahoo.com is the canonical Yahoo Finance URL (page loaded successfully, returned Yahoo Finance content).

deployment_spec.txt Section 1 line 170: 'Terminal         https://www.bloomberg.com'. www.bloomberg.com is the canonical Bloomberg URL (returned 403 via WebFetch, which is expected for Bloomberg's bot protection, but the domain is correct).
deployment_spec.txt Section 1 line 171: 'Wire             https://www.reuters.com'. www.reuters.com is the canonical Reuters URL (WebFetch blocked, but domain is universally known as correct).
deployment_spec.txt Section 1 (embedded in setup_task.sh line 173): 'Folder: "Regulatory"'. Cross-referenced with export_result.sh which checks for 'regulatory' in exported HTML.

deployment_spec.txt Section 1 line 174: 'SEC EDGAR        https://www.sec.gov'. www.sec.gov is the canonical SEC URL (returned 403 via WebFetch due to bot protection, but domain is the official SEC website).

deployment_spec.txt Section 1 line 175: 'FINRA            https://www.finra.org'. Verified via WebFetch - page loaded successfully, returned 'FINRA Homepage' with canonical URL https://www.finra.org/.
deployment_spec.txt Section 1 (embedded in setup_task.sh line 177): 'Folder: "Internal Tools"'. Cross-referenced with export_result.sh which checks for 'internal tools' in exported HTML.
deployment_spec.txt Section 1 line 178: 'Code Repos       https://github.com'. Verified via WebFetch - page loaded successfully, confirmed canonical URL is https://github.com/.

deployment_spec.txt Section 1 line 179: 'Wiki             https://confluence.atlassian.net'. This is a placeholder for the company's Confluence Cloud instance (returns 404 without a specific site subdomain, which is expected). The URL format is correct for Atlassian Confluence Cloud.

deployment_spec.txt Section 2 lines 186-187: '1. https://finance.yahoo.com' and '2. https://github.com'. Both URLs independently verified. setup_task.sh sets restore_on_startup=5 and startup_urls=[] as non-compliant defaults; agent must change to restore_on_startup=4 with these two URLs.

deployment_spec.txt Section 2 line 190: 'https://intranet.meridianfs.com'. This is an intentionally fictional internal corporate URL (company intranet). setup_task.sh sets show_home_button=False as non-compliant default; agent must enable home button and set this URL.

deployment_spec.txt Section 3 line 196: 'Tracking prevention level: Strict'. In Edge Preferences JSON, Strict corresponds to tracking_prevention.tracking_prevention_level=3 (Basic=1, Balanced=2, Strict=3). setup_task.sh sets level=1 (Basic) as non-compliant default.

deployment_spec.txt Section 3 line 197: 'Offer to save passwords: Off'. In Edge Preferences JSON, this maps to credentials_enable_service=false. setup_task.sh sets credentials_enable_service=True as non-compliant default.

deployment_spec.txt Section 3 line 198: 'Save and fill addresses: Off'. In Edge Preferences JSON, this maps to autofill.profile_enabled=false. setup_task.sh sets autofill.profile_enabled=True as non-compliant default.

deployment_spec.txt Section 3 line 199: 'Send "Do Not Track" requests: On'. In Edge Preferences JSON, this maps to enable_do_not_track=true. setup_task.sh sets enable_do_not_track=False as non-compliant default.

deployment_spec.txt Section 4 line 205: 'Default search engine: DuckDuckGo'. DuckDuckGo is available as a pre-installed search engine option in Microsoft Edge on Linux. Verified during live testing that DuckDuckGo appears in Edge's search engine settings (Settings > Privacy > Address bar and search).

deployment_spec.txt Section 4 line 206: 'Default download folder: /home/ga/Documents/Downloads'. setup_task.sh creates this directory (mkdir -p) and sets savefile.default_directory='/home/ga/Downloads' as non-compliant default. export_result.sh reads both savefile.default_directory and download.default_directory.

pi_items.metadata_value: IT Systems Administrator - corporate browser provisioning for new employee workstation
pi_items.verified_value: IT Systems Administrator - corporate browser provisioning for new employee workstation
pi_items.source: Consistent with the task scenario. deployment_spec.txt header: 'MERIDIAN FINANCIAL SERVICES - Edge Browser Standard v3.2' and 'ANALYST WORKSTATION BROWSER DEPLOYMENT'. The task simulates a real IT provisioning workflow.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must read /home/ga/Desktop/deployment_spec.txt and execute all configuration directives. Required bookmark structure on the Favorites Bar: folder 'Market Data' containing bookmarks 'Markets' (https://finance.yahoo.com), 'Terminal' (https://www.bloomberg.com), 'Wire' (https://www.reuters.com); folder 'Regulatory' containing 'SEC EDGAR' (https://www.sec.gov), 'FINRA' (https://www.finra.org); folder 'Internal Tools' containing 'Code Repos' (https://github.com), 'Wiki' (https://confluence.atlassian.net). Startup pages must be set to open https://finance.yahoo.com and https://github.com (restore_on_startup=4 in Edge preferences). Home button URL must be https://intranet.meridianfs.com. Privacy settings: tracking prevention must be Strict (level 3), password saving disabled (credentials_enable_service=false), address autofill disabled (autofill.profile_enabled=false), Do Not Track enabled (enable_do_not_track=true). Default search engine must be DuckDuckGo. Download directory must be /home/ga/Documents/Downloads. Favorites must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/browser_config_export.html. A deployment log must be written to /home/ga/Desktop/deployment_log.txt listing each change and its final value. The initial state is deliberately non-compliant: tracking=Basic(1), passwords=on, autofill=on, DNT=off, startup=new-tab(5), home-button=off, downloads=/home/ga/Downloads, bookmarks=empty.
